gpu: AMD Radeon RX 7900 XT (radeonsi, navi31, LLVM 19.1.7, DRM 3.61, 6.14.0-22-generic)
notes: Works fine out of the box

gpu: AMD Radeon RX 5700 XT (navi10, LLVM 15.0.0, DRM 3.48, 6.0.7-301.fc37.x86_64)
